evidence: Sean Gagen is the principal of Grassroots SG, LLC, a Virginia-based field-organizing consultancy; the firm bio matches the filing's employer string 'Grassroots,sg,llc' and the Ashburn VA 20147 zip is corroborated by an FEC-derived contribution record listing 'Sean Gagen, GRASSROOTS, SG, LLC, Ashburn VA 20147'. Firm bio lists 'Executive Director, Missouri Democratic Party (1997-1999)' and 'National Director of Organizing for the Bill Bradley for President Campaign (1999)'.

name: Rodman, Megan
resolved_employer: Bluebird Strategy Group (owner) — Dallas-based Democratic political and nonprofit fundraising consultancy; previously operated as Megan Rodman Strategies / MRM & Co.
evidence: Megan Rodman (Megan Rodman McGilberry) is a Dallas-based political and nonprofit fundraising consultant whose published client list includes Sen. Kirsten Gillibrand, Rep. Colin Allred and Rep. Marc Veasey; she appears in Texas campaign-finance payee records as 'Megan Rodman Strategies' and 'Megan Rodman McGilberry (Consult)'. 'Bluebird Strategy Group' also appears as a Texas campaign-finance payee, consistent with the filing's employer string and her occupation 'Owner', though the direct Rodman-to-Bluebird ownership link is not documented in a source I could retrieve — hence medium confidence. Dallas 75206 and a heavily Democratic federal giving history (44 donations) corroborate the identity.

affiliations.org: Democratic campaign / nonprofit fundraising consultancy (Megan Rodman Strategies / MRM & Co. / Bluebird Strategy Group)

affiliations.role: Listed Texas campaign-finance payee matching donor's stated employer
affiliations.snippet: Transparency USA lists 'Bluebird Strategy Group' as a Texas campaign-finance payee receiving payments from Texas political committees/candidates.

name: Aberly, Naomi
resolved_employer: Not employed — full-time political donor, fundraiser and nonprofit board member; former Board Chair, Planned Parenthood Federation of America
evidence: Naomi Aberly of Boston, MA — FEC-derived donor records list her at Boston MA 02114 (and previously Dallas TX 75229) with employer/occupation 'Not Employed,' matching the D1 filing's zip and occupation exactly. She is a major Democratic donor and fundraiser: co-founder of Annie's List (2003) and Battleground Texas (2013), Board Chair of Planned Parenthood Federation of America 2017–2019, and spouse of hedge fund manager Larry Lebowitz; the Lebowitz-Aberly Family Foundation reported ~$54.7M in assets.

Her contributions since 2017 include donations to Giffords PAC, a PAC that works to elect supporters of gun-control legislation to Congress.
Aberly is listed among ACLU of Massachusetts board leadership; she also serves on the boards of the Texas Future Project, the Fairness Project and the Voter Formation Project.

name: Lorenz, Perry
resolved_employer: Self-employed downtown Austin real-estate developer (office at 1311-A E. Sixth St., Austin 78702); advisor/consultant to Mitchell Family Corp, the Mitchell family office
evidence: Perry Lorenz is a 50-year Austin resident who has worked primarily as a principal in the purchase, sale, development and management of downtown Austin real estate since 1977, forming and serving as managing general partner of numerous downtown development partnerships. With partners he has developed 1,000+ condominium units in mixed-use projects including Spring, BartonPlace, Este, The Pedernales, Saltillo Lofts and The Independent, and controlled full city blocks where several of downtown Austin's tallest towers now stand (including the site of the 1,022-ft Waterline). His Austin Chamber listing (Real Estate - Commercial, 1311-A E. Sixth St.) matches the East Austin office described in coverage of the Mitchell family. Zip 78703 (Old West Austin/Clarksville) is consistent. The filing's employer 'Mitchell Family Corp' is corroborated: Lorenz is the husband of Sheridan Mitchell Lorenz, daughter of the late Texas oil and gas billionaire George P. Mitchell, and father of Katherine Lorenz, president of the Cynthia and George Mitchell Foundation; Mitchell Family Corp is the family's Austin/The Woodlands family office. Note: Mitchell Family Corp is a family office and philanthropic-support entity, not an operating oil & gas company (Mitchell Energy & Development was sold to Devon Energy in 2002), so no oil_gas flag is asserted for Lorenz himself.

resolved_employer: Austin-Travis County EMS (ATCEMS) — paramedic/EMS Commander and ICU nurse; President of the Austin EMS Association (labor union) 2019-2025
evidence: Matches the well-documented Selena Xie, an ATCEMS paramedic who served six years as President of the Austin EMS Association, the union representing 500+ Austin paramedics, and who negotiated three City of Austin labor contracts. Occupation 'Paramedic' and employer 'ATCEMS' in the filing match her public record exactly; a Texas Ethics Commission campaign finance filing separately lists her as 'Xie, Selena — Paramedic, ATCEMS.' She is herself a 2026 candidate for Austin City Council District 8, so a fuller public record legitimately exists. Classified as Labor rather than Government because her policy-relevant public role is union leadership.

affiliations.snippet: Served as President of the Austin EMS Association for six years, representing more than 500 paramedics and leading them through the COVID-19 pandemic, Winter Storm Uri, and the opioid crisis; negotiated three contracts with the City of Austin.
Former Austin EMS Association president Selena Xie announced a campaign for Austin City Council District 8, challenging incumbent Paige Ellis in the November 3, 2026 election.

name: YOKUBAITIS, C M
resolved_employer: Data Foundry / Golden Frog / Giganews / Texas.Net — co-founder and co-CEO (retired; Data Foundry sold to Switch Inc. in 2021)
evidence: 'C M Yokubaitis' at zip 78746 is Carolyn M. Yokubaitis of Austin, who with her husband Ron Yokubaitis co-founded Texas.Net (one of the first 50 U.S. ISPs, 1994), Giganews, Golden Frog (VyprVPN) and the Austin data-center company Data Foundry, where she served as co-CEO. Federal contribution records list the identical contributor string 'C M YOKUBAITIS' at zip 78746 with employer/occupation 'DATA FOUNDRY/CEO', matching this donor's name and zip exactly; 'RETIRED' on the current filing is consistent with Data Foundry's 2021 sale to Switch. The second Yokubaitis donor at the same zip in this batch is the household match (Ron Yokubaitis, same 78746 address).

affiliations.org: Data Foundry / Golden Frog / Giganews / Texas.Net
affiliations.snippet: Data Foundry's founders page: Carolyn co-founded Texas.Net with her husband Ron, "one of the first 50 Internet service providers (ISPs) in the United States," and the couple later established Giganews and Golden Frog, which operates the VyprVPN service, before building Data Foundry's Austin data centers.

FEC individual-contribution data mirrored by city-data lists "C M YOKUBAITIS" (zip 78746, DATA FOUNDRY/CEO) giving $500 to the Cornyn Majority Committee on 04/21/2010, and "R YOKUBAITIS" (same zip, SELF-EMPLOYED/INTERNET TECH) giving $1,000 to Scott Brown for US Senate on 01/10/2010.
